figures.caption: Figure 1: Overview of DelayMix. Given the current data window Xc and the current exogenous variables Uc, the proposed method incrementally constructs a moment-based system tensor, decomposes it into regime-specific Markov parameters, realizes for each regime an equivalent delay-free state-space model, and uses these models to forecast future trajectories.
Figure 2: Forecasting performance comparison. On the delayed mixture benchmark, DelayMix outperforms competing methods in terms of mean squared error (MSE) and mean absolute error (MAE).
Figure 4: Efficiency of streaming DelayMix: Our method is consistently faster than other baseline methods.
